name: @harrisonwang/spoor-wasm
description: Browser and edge WASM bindings for spoor-core

scripts.build:core: wasm-pack build --target bundler --scope harrisonwang --out-dir pkg-core --release --no-default-features --features core-formats
scripts.build:web: wasm-pack build --target web --scope harrisonwang --out-dir pkg-web --release --no-default-features --features full
scripts.build:web:core: wasm-pack build --target web --scope harrisonwang --out-dir pkg-web-core --release --no-default-features --features core-formats
